mapper.insert: INSERT INTO shopping_cart (user_id, name, dish_id, setmeal_id, dish_flavor, number, amount, image, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{name}, #{dishId}, #{setmealId}, #{dishFlavor}, #{number}, #{amount}, #{image}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT amount, create_time, dish_flavor, dish_id, id, image, name, number, setmeal_id, user_id FROM shopping_cart WHERE user_id = #{userId}
